task.title: Migrate openclaw-web to Next.js with static root and SSR invite page

events.content: Use SST Nextjs component instead of manual Lambda/static routing: Use SST Nextjs component instead of manual Lambda/static routing

raw.question: Use SST Nextjs component instead of manual Lambda/static routing
raw.chosen: Use SST Nextjs component instead of manual Lambda/static routing
raw.reasoning: Simplifies routing and caching behavior while keeping token routes server-rendered and non-token route statically cached by default

retrospective.summary: Converted openclaw-web to Next.js app (static /openclaw, dynamic /openclaw/invite/[token]), updated SST config to Nextjs component, added SKILL sync script, and validated with successful Next production build.
